# Mapper Scripts - AGENTS.md

## PURPOSE

Surgical transformation of AI Studio code to kaTai services

## CONSTRAINTS

- Only modify mapping logic, not component structure
- Keep visual output identical to AI Studio version
- Test with npm run mapper:all after changes

## VERIFICATION

After making changes, run: `npm run mapper:all &amp;&amp; npm run -s verify`




## AUTOMATED GUARDS

- **layers.callgraph** (structural): Inter-layer calls must follow LAYERS.callGraph.
- **mock.initial.strip** (prohibition): Mock initial conditions MUST be stripped during surgeon phase.
  - Enforcement: `ban` → `scripts/verify/ban-initial-mocks-in-mounted.mjs`
- **mount.slot.baseline.before** (policy): Before mounting, slot MUST contain baseline stub component.
- **mount.slot.mounted.after** (policy): After mounting, slot MUST contain mounted component with correct export name.
- **index.html.no-manual-edits** (prohibition): Root /index.html MUST NOT be edited manually. Regenerated by mapper from AI Studio template.
  - Enforcement: `drift` → `scripts/verify/mapper-determinism.mjs`
- **repo.no-forbidden-tokens** (prohibition): Forbidden tokens (mock/initial) MUST NOT exist in mounted code.
  - Enforcement: `ban` → `scripts/verify/ban-old-identifiers-in-src.mjs`

## COMPLETION REPORT

After finishing (or halting), you MUST emit FRIDA Run Report (contract:FRIDA_RUN_REPORTING). Include changed files, verification status, and model when known (do not guess).
